Now used by 1,400+ farms in 18 countries

The modern way
to manage your farm.

Improve farm efficiency, productivity, and profitability with the all-in-one farm platform that drives real results by bringing your team, records, sales, data and more together in one easy-to-use place.

Everything your farm needs,
in one powerful platform

Stop switching between spreadsheets, notebooks, WhatsApp groups and outdated software.

Livestock & Animal Records

Track breeding, health events, vaccinations, milk yield, weight, treatments and genealogy — all in one place.

Crop & Field Management

Plan planting, track inputs, monitor growth stages, record applications, predict yields and manage rotations.

Financials & Profitability

Income, expenses, invoices, cost per hectare/animal, gross margin, break-even analysis — real numbers, not guesses.

Team & Task Management

Assign tasks, set reminders, track progress, share notes and photos — keep everyone aligned.

Weather & Field Insights

Local forecasts, soil moisture alerts, disease risk warnings, growing degree days — data-driven decisions.

Mobile-first & Offline

Works perfectly on phone & tablet — record data in the field even without internet.

Ready to run a smarter farm?

Join hundreds of progressive farmers who already increased profitability and reduced stress with SmartFarm.
